suppress.notes: False positive: 7.2.1.202505142326-r is the patched release for CVE-2025-4949 per Eclipse advisory. ODC matches the CPE range "up to 7.2.0" because it parses the OSGi version as 7.2.1 only.

False positive: Apache advisory for CVE-2026-54399 and CVE-2026-54428 applies to org.apache.httpcomponents.core5:httpcore5 (5.4.2 and earlier), not the legacy org.apache.httpcomponents:httpcore 4.4.x line. 4.4.16 is the latest 4.x release and is pulled transitively by hapi-fhir-server.
